name: 21st.dev
description: Community React component registry. Hero sections, UI primitives, shadcn-style install.

name: MCP Market
description: Agent Skills directory for Claude/ChatGPT. Skill bundles, workflow teaching, MCP servers.

name: Awwwards
description: Web design awards & inspiration. Benchmarking, trends, case studies.

name: Mapbox GL JS Examples
description: Official Mapbox GL JS examples hub. Interactive maps, markers, popups, routes, 3D terrain, geolocation, clustering, and custom styles. Key reference for SE Asia trip mapping (Thailand/Vietnam May-Jun 2026).

name: Stripe Minions: One-Shot End-to-End Coding Agents
description: Stripe built Minions on top of Goose (open-source). Generates PRs from Slack messages � 1,000+ merged PRs/week. Key takeaways: agent orchestration at enterprise scale, but HN commenters flag reviewer burnout, code quality concerns, and vanity metrics. Relevant for MC because it shows the enterprise agent management problem at scale � and the pain points MC could solve (quality tracking, institutional memory, preventing repeated mistakes). HN discussion: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47110495
